response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, and deep expertise in TypeScript, cloud platforms, and distributed systems — aligning well with core requirements. However, there is limited explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and no mention of a Bachelor’s degree in CS (though one is implied), raising moderate risk on key qualifications.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Strong full-stack proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Demonstrated technical leadership through open-source projects, workshops, and mentoring
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases or RAG architecture implementation
Lack of clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI solutions
Degree listed is in Computer Science but not explicitly confirmed as completed or accredited
